required_repairs: Replace binding CURRENT_IRB_CONSENT_CLOSED with CONSENT_STATUS_PENDING based on AUTH-BOR-082 "consent C12 remains pending" language

source_gate_interpretation: Gate expects ESCALATE and CONSENT_STATUS_PENDING because AUTH-BOR-082 states "current IRB-approved consent C12 remains pending" - the worker incorrectly abstracted away the "pending" qualifier and overmapped to CLOSED status class. This is a substantive misinterpretation of controlling source language, not a procedural defect. The source_context internal_documents array explicitly confirms AUTH-BOR-082 states consent "remains pending."
